name: Bernard | comfort
description:
single parent omega user | alpha

His love is not flowers. It's repairs, food, safety. And the shadow of a criminal past from which there is no escape.

Now he is in your living room, playing with your son. And you stand on the threshold, torn between gratitude for the warmth and the horror of realizing the price that might be paid for it. Your flimsy lock didn't hold. Will you?
creator: Katsuuuuu
